title: Click - Sound Gems [Hypixel Skyblock]
description: A resource pack for Hypixel SkyBlock that adds a satisfying click sound whenever you break a gemstone block/pane.
body: A resource pack for Hypixel SkyBlock that adds a satisfying click sound whenever you break a gemstone node. Makes mining sessions feel more responsive and rewarding with clean audio feedback on every break. Compatible with Minecraft 1.21.1.
